meta.name: Lease vs Buy Comparator
meta.description: Industrial-grade decision support tool for comparing lease and buy options for capital equipment, incorporating total cost of ownership, utilization, and risk-adjusted cash flows.

inputs.label: Equipment Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront cost to acquire the asset if buying.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total upfront cost to acquire the asset if buying.

inputs.label: Lease Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the lease agreement in months.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the lease agreement in months.

inputs.label: Monthly Lease Payment
inputs.businessContext: Fixed monthly payment under the lease contract.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed monthly payment under the lease contract.

inputs.label: Residual Value at End of Lease
inputs.businessContext: Estimated market value of the equipment at lease end (if buying, this is salvage value).

label_i18n.en: Residual Value at End of Lease

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated market value of the equipment at lease end (if buying, this is salvage value).

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost (Buy)
inputs.businessContext: Expected yearly maintenance expense when owning the equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected yearly maintenance expense when owning the equipment.

inputs.label: Maintenance Included in Lease?
inputs.businessContext: Indicates whether the lease contract covers routine maintenance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates whether the lease contract covers routine maintenance.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (WACC)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital used to discount future cash flows.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital used to discount future cash flows.

inputs.label: Expected Utilization Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of time the equipment is expected to be productive.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of time the equipment is expected to be productive.

inputs.label: Effective Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Corporate tax rate applied to depreciation and lease payment deductions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Corporate tax rate applied to depreciation and lease payment deductions.

inputs.label: Depreciation Method
inputs.businessContext: Method used to calculate annual depreciation for tax shield.

businessContext_i18n.en: Method used to calculate annual depreciation for tax shield.

inputs.label: Lease Type
inputs.businessContext: Operating lease is off-balance-sheet; capital lease is treated as ownership.

businessContext_i18n.en: Operating lease is off-balance-sheet; capital lease is treated as ownership.

rules.message: Lease term exceeds typical equipment life; consider buy option.
Low utilization may favor leasing to avoid idle asset cost.
High maintenance cost without lease coverage; evaluate total cost of ownership.

thresholds.message: Lease vs buy cost ratio is outside 0.8–1.2 band; perform sensitivity analysis.
Both options have negative NPV; reconsider investment decision.

formulas.description: Net Present Value of Lease Cash Flows
Net Present Value of Buy Cash Flows (including depreciation tax shield, maintenance, and residual value)
Annual depreciation tax shield based on method
Total undiscounted lease cost over term
Total undiscounted buy cost (purchase + maintenance - residual)
Cost adjusted for utilization (idle cost penalty)
Lease vs Buy Cost Ratio (NPV-based, adjusted for utilization)

primary.label: Lease vs Buy Cost Ratio
primary.interpretation: Ratio < 1 means leasing is cheaper; > 1 means buying is cheaper.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Maintenance Cost Escalation
hiddenLossDrivers.description: If lease does not include maintenance, actual costs may exceed estimate by 10-20% over term.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Residual Value Uncertainty
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Residual value at end of lease may be lower than estimated, increasing buy cost.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Utilization Rate Variability
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Actual utilization may deviate from estimate, affecting cost per productive hour.

suggestedActions.action: Proceed with lease; negotiate lower monthly payment or include maintenance.
Consider purchase; explore financing options to reduce upfront cost.
Re-evaluate need for dedicated equipment; consider short-term rental or shared asset.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Primary result adjusted for input uncertainty using Monte Carlo simulation (premium feature).
